about.title: ClaimGuard fraud review
about.body: ClaimGuard scores every submitted claim for fraud risk and surfaces plain-language reasons to a human reviewer before payment. Open a claim in the Claims module to link it directly to its ClaimGuard risk review, or open the reviewer dashboard below.

home.title: ClaimGuard fraud review
home.body: Every claim submitted here can be scored for fraud risk in ClaimGuard, the companion reviewer dashboard -- open a claim to link it directly, or select one on the Claims list and use "Get AI Analysis (ClaimGuard)".
